text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's first three years in the Twinkle
Series have come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's achieved a lot in that time. Next, she just
has to get even stronger, and then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I feel like she's finally within reach...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can catch up to her... To my friend... And
probably in my next race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment of fate is finally upon us—the day
we'll get to look upon her friend's face for the
very first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There goes Manhattan Cafe! She's fast, she's
strong, and now she's the winner!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But what's wrong? She hasn't moved an inch since
she passed the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't look especially exhausted from here.
So what could possibly be...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I finally... get to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I finally get to see your face...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I just knew it... You're...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... This... isn't right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You're different from what I expected... You're...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who... are you?
Rooooar!
Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Where am I? It's so dark...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Who... are you? Are you... me? Or am I... you?)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Did... I become you? Or did you become me?)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (No, there's a bigger question... Just...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who... am I?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Am I... dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, I'm not... This is...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A... distant memory. I've... experienced this
before...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That can only mean...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... This question might sound a little ridiculous,
but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Am I... Manhattan Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes that's what everyone calls me... but
does that name represent who I am?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's always been my name in the past, but will it
stay my name forever?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What if my name weren't Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Could I still be here, standing by your side?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a difficult question. After thinking it over, I'm
left with a single answer.
choice_data_list:
Nothing would change, no matter what your
name was.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No matter what my name was...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for saying that... I feel a little better
now. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm still in the dark about my friend, and who she
really is...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The answer I was on the verge of finding vanished
into the haze...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But I think I'll keep on running... through this
obscure illusion.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So that one day... I'll become someone whose
existence is certain.
